title: neocuatrecasia cuzcoensis
intro: Neocuatrecasia cuzcoensis, also known as the Cuzco tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neocuatrecasia cuzcoensis include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Neocuatrecasia cuzcoensis can be found in various forms, such as infusions, teas, and ointments, which are typically prepared by boiling the roots or leaves in water.
